src/cyber_monitor/app.py.purpose: Flask app with routes, telemetry, security, memory, service, and collector endpoints

src/cyber_monitor/ml_anomaly.py.purpose: ML anomaly detection with IsolationForest, process capture, persistent anomaly history logging

src/cyber_monitor/network.py.purpose: LAN device discovery, ping sweep, port scanning

src/cyber_monitor/server.py.purpose: Collector server for receiving remote telemetry and Windows logs

src/cyber_monitor/templates/security.htm.purpose: Security view: processes, services, ML stats, anomaly history tab

mnt/master/anomaly_history.json.purpose: PERSISTENT append-only anomaly history with process snapshots

functions_added_2026_06_25.ml_anomaly.get_anomaly_history: Thread-safe getter for persistent anomaly history buffer
functions_added_2026_06_25.ml_anomaly._capture_top_processes: Snapshot top N CPU processes at anomaly detection time
functions_added_2026_06_25.ml_anomaly._append_to_history: Append anomaly to in-memory buffer and persistent JSON file
functions_added_2026_06_25.ml_anomaly._load_history_from_disk: Seed in-memory buffer from anomaly_history.json on startup

api_routes./api/security/anomaly-history: Persistent anomaly history with process snapshots (new 2026-06-25)

recent_changes.description: Added persistent anomaly process logging system
